categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

briefings.title: CVE-2008-4128: Cisco IOS actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Cisco IOS 12.4 contains multiple cross-site forgery vulnerabilities that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via (1) a certain "show privilege" command to the /level/15/exec/- URI, and (2) a certain…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-56291: Balbooa Forms actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Balbooa Forms contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload which could allow uploading of executable files leading to full RCE.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-48939: iCagenda iCagenda actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: iCagenda contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows the upload of arbitrary files in the file attachment feature, ultimately resulting in PHP code upload and execution.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-57433 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: Storable versions before 3.41 for Perl have a signed integer overflow when deserializing a crafted SX_HOOK record. retrieve_hook_common reads a signed 32-bit item count from an SX_HOOK record and calls av_extend with that count plus one.…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-61500 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 derives its session-cookie signing key from the non-cryptographic Math.random() generator and discloses outputs of the same generator to unauthenticated clients during login. A remote attacker can collect a…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-13221 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.1)
briefings.excerpt: Perl versions through 5.43.9 produce silently incorrect regular expression matches when an alternation of more than 65535 fixed string branches is compiled into a trie in Perl_study_chunk. When such branches are combined into a trie, the…
